intro: Tomorrow opens W6 (Base) — easy aerobic + flat strides, no lift. Mileage steps ~14 → ~17 mpw (~10% bump, §11.D).
Hill strides stay HELD: §11.D bars adding a new lower-body exercise the same week mileage bumps, and the 3-consecutive-SI-clean-weeks gate only lands this week. Flat strides per §2.A.
One job on the strides — cadence discipline. Adj #24 flagged reps 3-4 overshooting to 195/201 spm last Fri. Cap ~180 and let pace settle to ~6:00/mi feel.

flags: Hill strides HELD (§11.D mileage-bump week + 3-wk SI-clean gate only landing this week) — flat strides only
§4.A HR zones off rower-191 skew low for running (Adj #9) — nasal gate is the reference, not the off-191 ≤155 cap
Report SI status — unlogged the last 3 sessions (Thu/Fri/Sat); the hill-stride gate needs a confirmed clean streak
cardio.workout: 35:00 continuous Z1 easy + 4×20s flat strides (full walk/jog recovery between)

targets.pace: 9:45–10:45/mi (§4.A Z1 band); strides ~6:00/mi feel (mile-pace effort, not sprint)
targets.cadence: easy 165–172 spm; strides ≤180 (Adj #24) — fast but smooth

cardio.warmup: 5 min walk → easy build into Z1 pace within the 35-min block
cardio.cooldown: 5–10 min easy + SI prehab (Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1)
cues: Strides: hold cadence ~180, let pace settle to ~6:00/mi — don't chase the 5:50s like Fri's reps 3-4 (Adj #24)
Nasal gate on the easy block — if mouth opens at conversational pace, slow down regardless of HR
Flat terrain only; no intentional hills (§7.B W10 embargo)
Check AM SI / soreness from Sat PM long run before heading out (§11.C)
